Listed more than four days ago Admin & Operations Executive di PT Infinity GGG Indonesia Ini adalah lowongan kerja Full time Serpong , Banten Rp 6.000.000 – Rp 9.000.000 per month Own day-to-day internal operations to keep the company running smoothly, ensure stable execution in a fast-growing startup. Own day-to-day internal operations to keep the company running smoothly, ensure stable execution in a fast-growing startup. subClassification: Asisten Administratif Asisten Administratif classification: Administrasi & Dukungan Perkantoran (Administrasi & Dukungan Perkantoran) 4 hari yang lalu 4 hari yang lalu About the Role We are a multinational startup with a core team of around 10 people. The company is growing quickly, and many internal processes are still taking shape. We are looking for someone to own our day-to-day internal operations: someone who keeps things running reliably today, and notices what needs to become more organized as the company grows. This is a hands-on role. You will personally handle the work, not supervise others doing it. There are no direct subordinates. You may coordinate vendors, external advisors, and occasional part-time support, but the responsibility for follow-through sits with you. This is not a passive admin role. We are looking for someone who can notice, act, follow up, and improve. The scope is practical today, but it sits close to how the company operates and grows. The Work This role has three layers. 1. Keep things running You will make sure daily internal operations do not get stuck or fall through the cracks. This includes office matters, vendors, supplies, facilities, logistics, company documents, internal records, and practical support for the team. The goal is not to wait for problems to become visible to everyone. The goal is to notice early, handle what can be handled, and follow up until things are completed. 2. Carry the execution behind finance, employee, and compliance matters You will support the execution behind invoices, receipts, reimbursements, payment records, BPJS-related documents, onboarding/offboarding materials, attendance, leave records, and routine coordination with external advisors. You are not expected to make financial judgments. Our external finance advisor handles finance and accounting decisions. Your role is to keep the documents, records, coordination, and follow-ups clean, complete, and on time. 3. Improve how things work As you get closer to the daily work, you will see repeated problems, wasted time, unclear ownership, or tasks that are starting to outgrow the current way of doing them. This part of the role is not about building heavy systems or creating bureaucracy. It is about making simple improvements that actually help: checklists, trackers, templates, filing rules, vendor routines, communication habits, or clearer ways of working. The first two layers keep the company running. The third layer helps the company run better over time. Who This Role Is For This role is for someone with three qualities: ownership, judgment, and improvement mindset . 1. Ownership You notice what needs to be done, take action without waiting for detailed instructions, and follow through until things are completed. You do not see your role as simply completing assigned tasks. You see it as making sure the company’s internal operations do not get stuck. 2. Judgment You can work in an environment that is still changing and not fully structured. You do not judge a growing company by a fixed corporate template. Instead, you first understand how things currently work, then decide what needs to be handled now, what can wait, and what should be improved over time. 3. Improvement mindset You handle practical details yourself, but you also notice what keeps repeating, wasting time, or creating confusion. You like creating order through simple, useful improvements — such as checklists, trackers, templates, routines, or clearer ways of working — not through unnecessary rules or heavy processes. Who This Role Is Not For This role may not be a good fit if one of the following describes you. 1. You prefer assigned-task execution You are comfortable completing tasks when they are clearly assigned, but you do not naturally look around, notice what is missing, or take ownership of unassigned problems. 2. You need a highly structured environment You prefer working in an organization where processes are already mature, responsibilities are clearly defined, and most situations have an established way of handling them. 3. You separate thinking from doing You enjoy designing processes, giving suggestions, or pointing out what should be improved, but you are less interested in personally handling the operational details first. 4. You are looking for a different type of role You are mainly looking for a pure finance, HR, office management, or supervisory role. This role sits across internal operations and requires both execution and practical judgment. What We Look For We care less about a perfect background and more about how you work. You are likely to do well in this role if you are reliable, observant, structured, and practical. You can manage many small moving parts without losing track of the bigger picture. You communicate clearly, follow up consistently, and take pride in making things easier for the team around you. Relevant experience in administration, operations, finance admin, HR admin, office support, or similar work is helpful, but not enough by itself. We are looking for someone who combines careful execution with good judgment and a habit of improving how work gets done. You should be comfortable working in Bahasa Indonesia and basic-to-decent English, and able to work independently in a small, fast-changing team. What We Offer A small, capable team where your work is visible and genuinely matters. Direct access to founders and the core team, without unnecessary layers or micromanagement. Real ownership within your scope. A role close to the company’s internal operating system, with room to expand as the company grows and as you demonstrate strong judgment and ownership.

Communication & Personal Skills • Fluent English, spoken and written — TOEFL 550+ or equivalent strongly preferred. Listed more than two days ago Talent Acquisition Associate di Everlash Ini adalah lowongan kerja Full time Jakarta Selatan , Jakarta Raya Enjoy free beauty treatments — including nails, lash, brow, and wax Develop your skills and grow with continuous learning opportunities Work in a friendly, inspiring, and supportive environment Enjoy free beauty treatments — including nails, lash, brow, and wax Develop your skills and grow with continuous learning opportunities Work in a friendly, inspiring, and supportive environment Your HR journey starts here. Source, screen & present top talent for our operations team. Fresh grads welcome, grow with us. Your HR journey starts here. Source, screen & present top talent for our operations team. Fresh grads welcome, grow with us. subClassification: Perekrutan – Internal Perekrutan – Internal classification: Sumber Daya Manusia & Perekrutan (Sumber Daya Manusia & Perekrutan) 2 hari yang lalu 2 hari yang lalu About the Role Are you a fresh graduate excited to launch your career in Human Resources? Do you enjoy meeting new people, building connections, and helping teams grow? We are looking for a Talent Acquisition Associate to join our Operations team! In this role, you will be the first point of contact for candidates joining our company. You will help us source, screen, and interview great people across our operational teams (GRO/Customer Service, Beautician, Store Leader, and more), and present the best ones to our hiring managers for selection. You will report directly to the Operational Manager, while also being part of our HR team. It is a fantastic opportunity to learn recruitment from day one, work closely with senior leaders, and grow into a future HR or People Operations professional. No recruitment experience? No problem! We will train you. What we care about most is your energy, curiosity, and willingness to learn. What You Will Do End-to-End Recruitment Source candidates through job portals (Jobstreet, LinkedIn), referrals, walk-ins, and job fairs. Screen CVs and conduct first-round interviews to assess candidate fit. Coordinate interview schedules between candidates and hiring managers. Present shortlisted candidates to the Operational Manager for selection. Recruitment Tracker & Reporting Maintain and update the Recruitment Tracker daily — every candidate, every stage, every status. This is a core part of the role. Prepare weekly recruitment reports: fulfilment rate, time-to-fill, sourcing channel performance, and pipeline health. Keep the candidate database clean, organized, and ready for the team to reference at any time. Candidate Pipeline & Sourcing Build and grow an active talent pipeline so we always have great candidates ready when business needs them. Explore creative sourcing channels — social media, communities, campus networks, and beyond. Provide a warm and professional candidate experience throughout the hiring journey. Handover & Coordination Work closely with the Operational Manager to understand hiring needs and timelines. Hand over endorsed candidates smoothly to the People Operations team for offering and onboarding. Flag blockers or changes early so the team can move quickly. Job Posting & Employer Branding Post job openings on Jobstreet, LinkedIn, Karir.com, and other relevant platforms. Help keep our employer branding fresh, friendly, and aligned with our company image. Track applicant numbers per posting and suggest improvements. Who We Are Looking For Education Fresh graduates or final-year students (D3/S1) from Psychology, Human Resource Management, Management, Communications, or related majors are encouraged to apply. Internship experience in HR, Recruitment, or People Operations is a plus — but not required. Skills & Mindset Eager to learn: you are curious, ask great questions, and pick things up quickly. People person: you enjoy talking to candidates and can build rapport easily. Organized & detail-oriented: you keep trackers up to date and never let candidates slip through the cracks. Driven & resilient: you can handle volume, deadlines, and a fast-paced environment. Communicative: you can write professional messages and follow up clearly with candidates and Users. Adaptive: comfortable when priorities or hiring targets shift. Technical Knowledge Comfortable with Microsoft Excel (basic to intermediate) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets). Familiar with AI tools and able to use AI for real work — drafting job ads, screening notes, candidate communications, and speeding up daily tasks. Familiar with social media and digital platforms; bonus if you have used LinkedIn, Jobstreet, or Karir.com before. Basic understanding of Indonesian Labor Law (UU Ketenagakerjaan) is a plus — we will train you. WhatsApp Business knowledge is a bonus for high-volume candidate communication. job_title: Associate Product Manager - Subs Growth and Lifecycle
job_description: Listed more than three days ago Associate Product Manager - Subs Growth and Lifecycle di The Economist Group (Asia/Pacific) Limited Ini adalah lowongan kerja Full time Bandung , Jawa Barat ( Hibrid ) Associate PM driving subscriber growth via lifecycle optimization, monetization experiments, and data-led improvements across web and app journeys. Associate PM driving subscriber growth via lifecycle optimization, monetization experiments, and data-led improvements across web and app journeys. subClassification: Manajemen & Pengembangan Produk Manajemen & Pengembangan Produk classification: Pemasaran & Komunikasi (Pemasaran & Komunikasi) 3 hari yang lalu 3 hari yang lalu The Economist Group is the leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs. We deliver world-class, thought-provoking content through a range of formats, from web and app to print, conferences, film, and audio. What ties us together is the objectivity of our opinion, the originality of our insight, and our advocacy of economic and political freedom around the world. As our digital subscription business grows, so does the importance of delivering thoughtful, frictionless, and value-driven experiences across the entire subscriber lifecycle. About the role We are seeking a motivated Associate Product Manager to join our Subscriber Growth & Lifecycle product pillar. In this role, you will support the continuous improvement of subscription journeys that maximise subscriber lifetime value and foster long-term loyalty across web and app. This is a hands-on role with strong exposure to strategy and delivery. You will contribute to initiatives across retention, upgrades, and customer care, working closely with experienced product managers, engineers, analysts, marketers, and customer operations teams. It offers a valuable opportunity to develop deep expertise in subscription products, monetisation, and experimentation within a globally recognised media organisation. What you’ll do As the Associate Product Manager for Subscriber Growth & Lifecycle, you will be responsible for the following with support from more senior Product Managers: Own and optimise the end-to-end subscriber journey: You will be the product manager for key in-life subscription experiences, including upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and re-engagement flows. You will continuously identify and address friction points, and champion a subscriber-first mindset in everything you do. Drive monetisation and experimentation: You will develop and execute a roadmap of monetisation initiatives, including offers, add-ons, and subscription tiers. You will design and run experiments to optimise our upgrade and retention paywalls, and use data to inform our pricing and packaging strategies. Innovate in customer care: You will partner with our Customer Care teams to redefine how we serve our subscribers. You will lead the development of our self-service and assisted service journeys, including implementing AI-powered bots and other automation technologies to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction. Champion a data-driven culture: You will define and analyse key metrics such as churn, upgrades, engagement, and customer satisfaction. You will use this data to measure the impact of your initiatives, identify new opportunities, and communicate your progress to stakeholders. Lead with influence: You will write clear and compelling user stories, acceptance criteria, and product documentation. You will use your strong communication and collaboration skills to align your team and stakeholders around a shared vision and roadmap. What you’ll bring We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about building great products and eager to learn and grow. The ideal candidate will have: A proven track record of driving results: You have at least 2 years of experience in product management or a similar role (such as Product Marketing or Product Analytics) with a focus on digital customer journeys. You can point to specific examples of how you have used offers, discounts, add-ons, or subscription tiers to achieve business goals. A deep understanding of the subscriber lifecycle: You have experience with paywall campaigns, experiments, or launches across web and app. You are familiar with the key levers for driving subscriber engagement, retention, and lifetime value. A strategic and analytical mindset: You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment with shifting priorities. You have a structured, data-informed approach to problem-solving and prioritisation. You are proficient in using data to make decisions and measure success. Exceptional collaboration and communication skills: You are a natural collaborator who can work effectively with designers, engineers, analysts, and operational teams. You can articulate your ideas clearly and persuasively, and you are a great listener. A "go-getter" mindset with high autonomy: You are a self-starter who takes initiative and can run with things independently. While you will have support from senior PMs, you are comfortable taking the lead on projects, navigating ambiguity, and proactively pushing initiatives to completion. Nice to have: Experience managing monetisation for a B2C app and web product. Exposure to monetisation automation, personalisation, or machine-learning-driven decisioning. Familiarity with subscription platforms or lifecycle marketing tools (e.g., Zuora, SF). Experience with data analysis and visualisation tools (e.g., Amplitude, Tableau, SQL). Why this role matters This is an opportunity to make a real impact on The Economist's future. By improving our in-life subscription experience, you will not only drive revenue growth but also help us build a more sustainable and resilient business. You will be at the heart of our efforts to create a lifelong relationship with our readers and to ensure that The Economist remains the world's leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs for generations to come. Location: This role is based in South East Asia .

Join Evershine Group and support global clients through international cross-border corporate services and business expansion projects. subClassification: Layanan Bisnis & Penasihat Perusahaan Layanan Bisnis & Penasihat Perusahaan classification: Akuntansi (Akuntansi) 3 hari yang lalu 3 hari yang lalu 關於永輝集團 | About Evershine Group 永輝集團及其關係企業，透過雲端系統與跨國協作模式，為全球企業提供跨境財務會計、稅務遵循、企業設立、財務報表及國際企業服務支援。目前永輝集團服務來自全球多個國家之客戶，並協助企業拓展海外市場與國際營運。隨著印尼市場及國際業務持續成長，我們正在建立印尼跨境團隊，以支援全球客戶及印尼企業海外發展需求。我們期待建立具國際視野之印尼團隊，並培養未來參與全球跨境企業服務與海外平台發展之國際人才。 Evershine Group and its affiliated companies provide cross-border accounting, tax compliance, company incorporation, financial reporting, and international corporate support services for global businesses through cloud-based systems and international collaboration models. Currently, Evershine Group serves clients from multiple countries worldwide and supports businesses in expanding their overseas operations and international presence. As our Indonesia and international business continue to grow, we are building an Indonesia cross-border team to support both global clients and Indonesian companies expanding internationally. We aim to build an internationally-minded Indonesia team and cultivate future international talents who will participate in global cross-border corporate services and overseas platform development. 職位概要 | Position Overview 本職位不僅支援印尼客戶，也將參與全球客戶之跨境企業服務、財會、稅務及營運協調工作。錄取者將與台灣及海外團隊密切合作，接觸國際企業營運模式、跨境商業環境及全球企業服務案件。此外，本職位亦將參與協助印尼企業拓展海外市場與國際營運相關支援工作。本職位並非傳統地方行政職務，而是參與國際跨境專業服務平台發展之機會。 This role will not only support Indonesian clients, but will also participate in cross-border corporate services, accounting, tax, and operational coordination for global clients. The successful candidate will work closely with Taiwan and overseas teams while gaining exposure to international business operations, cross-border working environments, and global corporate service projects. In addition, this role may also participate in supporting Indonesian companies in their overseas expansion and international operations. This role is not a traditional local administrative position, but an opportunity to participate in a growing international cross-border professional service platform. 工作模式與工作環境 | Working Model & Environment 採用跨國雲端協作與彈性混合工作模式 工作地點以印尼為主，並透過雲端系統與台灣及海外團隊協作 視專案需求，可能安排線上會議、跨國協作或實體交流機會 國際化與 AI 輔助工作環境 強調自主學習、跨文化溝通與國際協作能力 Flexible hybrid working environment with cloud-based cross-border collaboration Primary working location is based in Indonesia while collaborating with Taiwan and overseas teams through cloud-based systems Depending on project requirements, opportunities may include online meetings, international collaboration, and occasional in-person engagement International and AI-assisted working environment Emphasis on self-learning, cross-cultural communication, and international collaboration 工作型態 | Employment Type 初期合作模式可能以 contract-based collaboration 方式進行，並依據個人表現、團隊發展及組織需求，提供未來長期合作或 full-time 發展機會。 Initial engagement may start under a contract-based collaboration model, with future opportunities for long-term or full-time development based on individual performance, organizational growth, and team development. 工作內容 | Main Responsibilities 專案導入與客戶支援 | Project Implementation & Client Support 協助全球客戶及印尼企業海外拓展相關專案之溝通與協調。 Assist in communication and coordination for global client projects and overseas expansion projects of Indonesian companies. 協助安排並參與客戶導入會議，以了解客戶需求。 Assist in coordinating and participating in implementation meetings to understand client requirements. 與客戶聯繫並取得所需文件與資料。 Communicate with clients to obtain required documents and information. 協助內部部門進行相關營運與系統設定。 Coordinate internally regarding operational setup and support matters. 協助向客戶說明服務流程與後續事項。 Assist in explaining service processes and follow-up matters to clients. 財會與營運工作 | Accounting & Operational Work 審核客戶憑證與相關文件，確保帳務資料完整與正確。 Review supporting documents and ensure accounting records are accurate and complete. 協助編製每月財務報表與相關資料。 Assist in preparing monthly financial reports and related schedules. 協助稅務申報與稅務行政作業。 Support tax filing and tax administration matters. 協助薪資、BPJS（印尼社會保險）及付款相關行政作業。 Assist in payroll, BPJS (Indonesia social security), and payment-related administrative work. 協助銀行往來及付款相關事宜。 Support banking and payment coordination matters. 與客戶維持良好溝通與合作關係。 Maintain good communication and relationships with clients. 追蹤客戶案件進度與相關時程。 Follow up on client tasks, deadlines, and required documentation. 協助全球客戶之跨境營運、財會及企業服務相關支援工作。 Support cross-border operations, accounting, and corporate service matters for global clients. 協助主管交辦之其他事項。 Assist supervisors with additional assigned tasks. 培訓制度 | Training & Development System 跨境案件與國際企業服務培訓 全球客戶協作與溝通模式學習 雲端協作與 AI 工具應用環境 國際財會、稅務與跨境企業服務實務接觸 與海外團隊共同參與專案及學習機會 Cross-border case and international corporate service training Exposure to global client collaboration and communication models Cloud-based collaboration and AI-assisted working environment Exposure to international accounting, tax, and cross-border corporate service practices Opportunities to participate in projects and learning experiences with overseas teams 職涯發展 | Career Development 接觸全球客戶與跨境企業服務案件 與海外團隊合作之國際工作經驗 培養國際財會、跨境營運與企業服務能力 參與國際商業拓展與跨境解決方案相關專案 未來參與永輝海外平台與國際團隊發展機會 Exposure to global clients and cross-border corporate service projects International working experience through collaboration with overseas teams Development of international accounting, cross-border operations, and corporate service capabilities Opportunity to participate in international business expansion projects and cross-border corporate solutions Future opportunities to participate in Evershine’s overseas platform and international team development 應徵條件 | Candidate Requirements 學歷背景 | Educational Background 以下科系尤佳： 歡迎對跨境企業服務與國際財會領域有興趣之應屆畢業生應徵。 Fresh graduates interested in cross-border corporate services and international accounting fields are welcome to apply. 具財會或稅務相關工作經驗者尤佳。 Candidates with accounting or
